programme.desc: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show him how great they are.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sleepy Time/ Suds
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his friends' dreams; Bob musters the courage to visit the doctor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: My Sharon-Ah
programme.desc: Brendar faces off against a Royal Order rival, but the result casts doubt about her ability to complete her ultimate quest.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Parent Just Don’t Understand
programme.desc: Evan is forced to return to his parents’ house to secure Trolls Passage on the group’s journey, but it won’t be easy since he already burned that bridge.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: When Dragons Cry
programme.desc: To get the dragon’s tears needed for Axe, the group must first visit a magical marketplace, where Stacey’s meeting with a witch finally reveals Brendar’s complicated backstory.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Mapmaker, Mapmaker, Make Me a Map
programme.desc: In need of a unique custom map for their next quest, Brendar and the group attempt to wine and dine the only map maker in Gothmoria capable of creating the map they need.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: After getting caught in a snowstorm, Evan accidentally damages the snow ogre meant to protect local villagers and is made to stand trial for his crime.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Pictures of Boo
programme.desc: In need of shelter from a storm and desperately seeking sleep, the group of questers are welcomed into a mysterious house by a strange Colonel.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Indestructible Henry
programme.desc: When Kid Danger is almost badly injured on a mission, Henry decides to go through the densitizer and become indestructible like Captain Man. Unfortunately things don't turn out quite the way Henry hopes they will.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger, Captain Man and their crew take their crime fighting skills on fun adventures.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Hour of Power
programme.desc: When Drex, a dangerous criminal who just escaped from Swellview prison, embarrasses Kid Danger and traps Captain Man in a helmet, Kid Danger must use the help of Schwoz to gain a superpower and defeat Drex.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force: Lil' Dynomite
programme.desc: When Danger Force accidentally forgets about plans they have with Ray, he surprises them with a brand new member of the team to make them jealous.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Hour of Power
programme.desc: When Drex, a dangerous criminal who just escaped from Swellview prison, embarrasses Kid Danger and traps Captain Man in a helmet, Kid Danger must use the help of Schwoz to gain a superpower and defeat Drex.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Sleepover to End All Sleepovers/ A Day at the Aquarium
programme.desc: Anne and Marcy issue a Scare Dare challenge that brings Sprig and Polly into forbidden areas of the castle. Anne and the Plantars look to spend what could be their last day together at the Newtopia Aquarium.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Droids of Distress
programme.desc: The rebels intercept a shipment of powerful weapons intended for the Empire, but the sale of the weapons doesn’t go according to plan when a frightened C-3PO calls the authorities.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rise of the Old Masters
programme.desc: An underground broadcast reveals that the Empire is holding a Jedi Master prisoner. In a bold rescue attempt the crew of the Ghost voyages to the bleak prison world of Stygeon Prime only to fall into a trap engineered by the Inquisitor.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred's Bro-Tillion
programme.desc: When supervillain Baron Von Steamer crashes Fred's Bro-Tillion, the Big Hero 6 team springs into action.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape To/ From Atlantis
programme.desc: Dewey's attempts to impress Scrooge on a trip to the Lost City of Atlantis leads to trouble. Donald tries to protect the boys from his new employer who is trying to destroy them.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Great Revolution! Legend Festival!
programme.desc: It’s time to get hyped! With the curtains finally open on the Legend Festival, Blading legends and challengers alike are gathered for the ultimate showdown. The first stage: battle royale!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Hyuga and Lain vs Hikaru and Aiger!
programme.desc: Participants in the Legend Festival are off to compete in the second stage! Next up is a series of team battles starting with Hyuga and Lain taking on Hikaru and Aiger. Meanwhile, Valt, Free, Rantaro, and Silas prep for their own battle.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: OK Zoomer
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe help job seekers land their next big gig and pitch their memoirs to a focus group. The losing joker will deliver news heard around the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: The guys share shameful secrets in the park, don headsets at a fast food drive-through, and try to convince unsuspecting strangers to dance with them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Do Something to My Face
programme.desc: The guys enlist shoppers to settle senseless debates in the mall, scream for ice-cream as patrons in a parlour and protest unconventional causes in the park.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 14
programme.desc: Inept arsonists, butterfingered bank robbers and corrupt civil servants try and fail.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 15
programme.desc: Targets this week include department store peeping toms, art thieves and a man with a profound respect for property rights.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 23
programme.desc: Subjects include a woman who dials 911 with an urgent request for a husband and a robber who wraps his face in toilet paper but leaves behind prescription drugs with his name on the bottle.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Criminals 24
programme.desc: A church thief opts for a crucifix as his tool of choice, an angry lawyer vandalizes a former client and a Dutchman burns down his cell phone store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: A designer's plans to remarry are threatened when her first husband refuses to divorce her.

programme.desc: When a department store clerk finds out she's got three weeks to live, she decides to cash in her savings and live it up in Europe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The End
programme.desc: The family departs on one last family trip to Lake Tahoe where they relive some of their fondest memories from the show. Kim deals with some turbulence in her marriage.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette
programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fire Escape
programme.desc: When devastating wildfires erupt in their neighborhood, the family is forced to flee from their homes, threatening to ruin the fairytale birthday party Rob is planning for his daughter. Kim awaits the president's word on her prison reform legislation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife
programme.desc: As the kids head back to school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire is coping with an empty nest. Over at Jay's, he and Gloria are in disagreement over Manny's interesting choice of outfit for his first day of class.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Mexican
programme.desc: Some of the best stops on Guy's road trip have been Mexican Places. With generations of family recipes and fresh ingredients, it's not wonder the food is incredible.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Land And Sea
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri crosses the country to reel in some surf and dig into some turf. From carnivorous cravings to serious seafood, these places are chock-full of flavor that's sure to please every palate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Incredible Italian
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's eatin' up all kinds of incredible Italian. From Boston to San Francisco, Ohio to Omaha, plates are piled with favorites like pasta, polenta, piccata and pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legends of Texas
programme.desc: Guy is cruising the lone star state for a bite of Texas style triple d. From gumbo to Greek, pizza to burgers, and tasty twists from Dallas to Houston.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Welcome Back, Winners

programme.desc: Golf phenom Michelle Wie joins Food Network's Scott Conant to add a stroke to Bobby Flay's game. Saratoga, N.Y., chefs Jeannette Liebers and Chris Bonnivier are on the scene to make sure Bobby takes a mulligan.

programme.desc: Trisha welcomes five young and amazing musicians from the Music City Youth Orchestra. After making a hearty, cheesy chicken enchilada, the kids arrive to shake things up with nacho salads in a jar.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Day Off
programme.desc: Praline cheesecake bars, jambalaya and rice, a ginger grapefruit fizz and an irresistible, chocolate covered snack.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Go Nuts for Doughnuts!
programme.desc: A trip to Five Daughters Bakery in Nashville inspires Trisha Yearwood to make a doughnut-based menu, including Green Onion Cheddar Doughnuts, Doughnut Grilled Cheese, Tortellini Soup and an Iced Cafe Bombon.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Summertime Faves With a Twist
programme.desc: The hosts share favourite summer recipes with a delicious twist. Jeff makes a boneless riburger and Sunny shares an easy grilled garden state salad. Geoffrey makes his summertime seafood stable fish and chips with spicy tartar sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sun's Out, Buns Out
programme.desc: The summer sun and buns are out, burger, sandwich and hot dog buns, that is. Geoffrey shares his tips for a moist and flavourful mushroom turkey burger while Katie makes a meatless grilled halloumi sandwich with watermelon relish.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Hot Dogs, New Tricks
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro shares all the twists, turns and new takes on the beloved standby, the hot dog, and brings out his recipe for hot dog curly fries with dippers. Guest chef Mary Giuliani also makes her cacio e pepe and carbonara versions.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Easy Breezy Summer Meals
programme.desc: The hosts share easy, breezy summer meals. Katie makes baked rigatoni with tomato and eggplant, Jeff makes crispy grilled harissa shrimp Greek salad and Alex prepares summery corn soup, perfect for a hot summer day.

programme.title: Chopped: Beast Feast
programme.desc: The competitors face off in a protein-packed battle, even featuring some fierce ingredients that are too big for the baskets. In a fast and loud appetizer round, the blenders are booming as the chefs try to make meaty appetizers with a creative touch.

programme.title: All-Star Best Thing I Ever Ate: Deep Fried Decadence

programme.title: All-Star Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliant Barbecue
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck eats a smoky sandwich in LA, Duff Goldman gets barbecue surf and turf in Maryland, and Carla Hall loves smoked wagyu in Washington, DC. Plus, Bobby Flay shares a can't-miss brisket recipe, and Alton Brown smokes St. Louis-style ribs.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Great Fossil Rush
programme.desc: Jessica wanders into an unfamiliar creek, leaving Craig to find her before his mom notices.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wet and Wild
programme.desc: A hot summer weekend in Texas keeps wardens busy on the water. A festival attracts thousands of people to float the San Marcos River. Patrol on Lake Texoma leads to multiple arrests. A fisherman is questioned when he can't provide identification.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Blind Rage
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search and rescue mission for a missing fisherman. Agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught in the Crossfire
programme.desc: Suspicions flare when stray bullets strike an elderly couple's home and their neighbors are questioned. Game Wardens Raj Ataya and Clint Caywood rush to help an injured boater, and an overnight kayak patrol reveals campers throwing caution to the wind.

programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens investigate a Jet Ski accident that sends an injured man to the hospital. The Wardens must track down a hunter shooting doves in a residential neighbourhood. On Lake Lewisville, Wardens deal with a partier who's had too much to drink.

programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens search for an alligator that bit a man and his 13-year old son. In West Texas, an abandoned car leads the Wardens to believe a teenage girl may be missing. A man is suspected of hunting on his neighbor's property without permission.

programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Brooklyn Cat Fight
programme.desc: Jackson encounters Samantha, who fears her cat, Spike, so much she's been keeping him in a cat box outside her house. Also, Jackson makes his way to Brooklyn where a couple's relationship is suffering over the ongoing blood feud between their two cats.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Island of Time
programme.desc: Cameras capture the natural behaviour of dolphins at play. Also, gaze upon magnificent tropical fish near the Island of Time, just south of the Great Barrier Reef. Terri films the mating rituals of green water turtles.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: New Arrival
programme.desc: The zoo's Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for two years and is reaching the end of her tether. It's Thi's fourth baby and after giving birth to a stillborn, the zoo is keeping a close eye on her.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Alaskan Treetop Sauna
programme.desc: Pete creates an arboreal abode for an adventurous Alaskan couple that offers all the warm fuzzies they get from the outdoors without having to brave the bitter mountain cold.

programme.title: Tanked!: San Francisco Giants Tank
programme.desc: ATM needs to knock this next tank out of the park. The San Francisco Giants want to bring McCovey Cove inside the ballpark. This storied franchise needs a tank big enough to impress all of their loyal fans and have a bit of fun at the same time.

programme.desc: Tragedy strikes after Tia and M2 agree to take two emaciated hounds from a rural shelter. Mariah and Lizzy give two special dogs a happily ever after while working through the chaos of the global pandemic, and M2 reveals an exciting new life chapter.

programme.desc: The Kilchers get busy on outdoor projects to prepare for the winter months. Atz Sr., Eivin and Nikos scavenge for lumber while Atz Lee and Etienne mill wood. Jane and Charlotte build an enclosed camper and August creates a stunning, creative coop.

programme.desc: Kim and Stevie give speed-dating a whirl; Nikki spots Oglevee with a married woman.

programme.desc: Evicted from their house, Stevie and her moneyless mother move in with Nikki and Kim.

programme.title: The Parkers: It's Showtime
programme.desc: Nikki's friend wins the lottery, quits her job and recommends Nikki as her replacement.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Just Infatuation
programme.desc: Will and Carlton spy on Ashley when she goes on her first date with a famous singer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Working It Out

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Did the Earth Move for You?
programme.desc: When an earthquake strikes, strange things happen to the relationships in Will's family.

programme.desc: An all-out war ensues between Ashley's parents and those of a girl who is harassing her.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating
programme.desc: After Martin promises to spend more time with Gina, he ends up on jury duty with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets a Job
programme.desc: Will gets a job so he can pay his own way.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: PSAT Pstory
programme.desc: When Will scores higher than Carlton on an intelligence test, Carlton resorts to cheating.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Daisy's deteriorating memory prompts Brown to get in touch with Daisy's long lost cousin Lorraine. Meanwhile, with Sasha's help, Cora teaches Reggie a lesson when he reveals his old fashioned attitude about gender roles.

programme.title: Futurama: How Hermes Requisitioned His Groove Back

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: Movie: Robocroc
programme.desc: When a top-secret unmanned spacecraft crash-lands in Adventure Land, a combination water park and crocodile zoo, a crocodile gets transformed into a robot by nanobots and goes on a deadly rampage.

programme.desc: After being shot by a policeman, a man finds himself in a place he assumes is heaven.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare as a Child
programme.desc: A strange girl warns a schoolteacher of a man she saw earlier, who visits her later on.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: A man's dreams of a perfect life in a quaint small town come true, but with a price.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Chaser
programme.desc: A man who purchases a love potion to win the woman of his dreams finds it works too well.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Passage for Trumpet
programme.desc: A depressed trumpet player decides to commit suicide when he feels his life is pointless.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: An elderly woman is haunted by her frequent fear of death knocking on her door incognito.

programme.title: Movie: Rings
programme.desc: Julia becomes worried about her boyfriend when he explores the dark urban legend surrounding a video that is said to kill the watcher in seven days. She sacrifices herself to save him and must solve the mystery of the movie before the curse takes her.

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: Movie: The Foreigner
programme.desc: After his daughter is killed in a terrorist blast, a grieving father becomes convinced that a government official is withholding information that could lead him to her killers, forcing him to use extreme and violent measures to get the information.

programme.title: Movie: 47 Meters Down
programme.desc: While on vacation in Mexico, a pair of sisters goes out to observe sharks in the ocean. When the chain on their observation cage snaps, they plunge into the shark-infested, lightless depths, finally settling on the ocean floor 47 meters down.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Longest Bar in Alabama
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams. Then, Texas Two Step's Jon Pierre and Mary assist the Napiers in opening up the local sports bars to stunning river views.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Say Yes to Wetumpka
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honoring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name. Then, guests Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day, and Mina Starsiak Hawk helps renovate the home of two local heroes.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: A Little Spark Can Go a Long Way
programme.desc: Taking on Wetumpka's main thoroughfare, Ben and Erin get some help from Steve Ford and Tamara Day to give each storefront individual flair. Meanwhile, the Napiers add drama and function to a Craftsman owned by two dynamic women dedicated to theater.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Blooming on the Coosa
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.

programme.title: Home Town: A Musician's Retreat
programme.desc: A recording producer is back in Laurel looking for an artist's retreat. He received a dilapidated cabin from his late father, and while Ben and Erin are up for the risky restoration challenge, they think he'll get a better return with a bungalow in town.

programme.title: Home Town: Clean Lines, Open Spaces
programme.desc: After living in temporary situations after a tornado destroyed his house, a man is ready to find a home with clean lines and open spaces. Ben and Erin give his new place a complete facelift, creating an awesome midcentury modern home with a cozy study.

programme.title: House Hunters: Searching for a Chicago Condo
programme.desc: Chicago buyers Kevin and Kevin are having a hard time finding a condo they can agree on. With this former long-distance relationship coming together in the Windy City, it seems the only thing they have in common is their name.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Blooming on the Coosa
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.

programme.title: Home Town: Clean Lines, Open Spaces
programme.desc: After living in temporary situations after a tornado destroyed his house, a man is ready to find a home with clean lines and open spaces. Ben and Erin give his new place a complete facelift, creating an awesome midcentury modern home with a cozy study.

programme.title: House Hunters: Searching for a Chicago Condo
programme.desc: Chicago buyers Kevin and Kevin are having a hard time finding a condo they can agree on. With this former long-distance relationship coming together in the Windy City, it seems the only thing they have in common is their name.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life for a Growing Family
programme.desc: A Chicago woman moves her family from the big city to a small town in Mississippi. She's looking for a family-friendly house for her kids and future grandchild with room to entertain and a private oasis for herself.

programme.title: Home Town: A Little Rough, a Little Refined
programme.desc: Caroline and her husband, Corey, are moving home to follow her dream of opening a men's store. With a budget of $150,000, they're hoping to find a house that matches their authentic, early-century style and has an office worthy of their new business.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Reno Rescue
programme.desc: Jenn Todryk helps a couple with a baby on the way by completing the renovation they started years ago and were never able to finish. Next, she works with a recently married couple to make their home look and function better for their blended family.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Color Correction
programme.desc: A single mom who loves to bake asks Jenn Todryk to turn her kitchen into a cake maker's paradise without burning up the budget. Then, Jenn helps a couple update their home to make it more user-friendly for their very active family.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Dark Wood Dilemma
programme.desc: Jenn helps a couple of recent empty nesters who have enjoyed their home for 20 years give its dark interior a complete update. Next, a frequently moving family asks Jenn to turn their latest home into the place where they'll want to stay for a long time.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Family Memories
programme.desc: A couple asks Jenn to revitalize their outdated family home which contains, among other challenges, the most unusual bathroom she's ever seen. Next, Jenn works with a family whose home has lots of space but no personality to give it the style it deserves.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Glam Guest House
programme.desc: A couple who bought their home eight years ago loved the layout but not the look, so Jenn gives them a Cape Cod-style makeover that works for their entire family. Then, Jenn transforms a plain pool house into a glam guesthouse that's ideal for visitors.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Goodbye Beige
programme.desc: Jenn tackles a project for her college best friend, and with a baby on the way, the pressure is on to finish in just two weeks! Next, she works with a couple who wants to transform their dated beige home into a bright, welcoming space for entertaining.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Hello Yellow
programme.desc: Jenn carves out more work and storage space for a growing family that incorporates their favorite color: yellow. Next, she helps a mom who regularly hosts gatherings update her 20-year-old home with a welcoming living area and entertainer's kitchen.

programme.title: Good Bones: Duplex Remodel Is Double the Trouble
programme.desc: After purchasing a duplex for $15,000, Karen and Mina get to work turning the cramped space with two sides into a single family home. Re-imaging the floor plan is easy -- it's staying on budget that's a challenge with this project.

programme.title: Good Bones: Flooded Two-Story Restored
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are welcomed into their new duplex with piles of clothes, two toilets and two feet of water in the basement. Although the girls have some disagreements, they hope all the hard work in this decrepit home pays off.

programme.title: Good Bones: Outdated Townhome Gets a Funky Facelift
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase an old townhome in the popular Bates-Hendricks neighborhood. After encountering dry rot and termites, the unpredictable roadblocks put a giant dent in their budget and on their attitudes toward the project.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Brickyard Brick House
programme.desc: Mina and Karen revamp a historic brick house in a rising area of south Indianapolis. The house is in bad shape. Luckily, they have a healthy budget of $200,000 and they are going to need every dime.

programme.title: Movie: All My Husband's Wives
programme.desc: Very shortly after her marriage, Alison Whitford finds herself a widow. Even worse, she finds out that her husband was murdered, and she isn't the only one mourning his death.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Deadly Past
programme.desc: Mackenzie is haunted by visions that suggest she killed a missing coed. She later discovers that her psychiatrist husband, Otto, has manipulated her memory to hide his own role in the murder.

programme.title: Movie: Betrayed by My Husband
programme.desc: A woman is devastated by the loss of her husband that is until she sees him alive. When her brother-in-law dies mysteriously, she is the chief suspect and must work quickly to prove her innocence.

programme.desc: A newly engaged woman begins to suspect her husband's ex isn't gone for good.

programme.desc: When a military veteran gets a new job in an Oklahoma town, his two brothers and their girlfriends move in with him for a fresh start. But their dreams are shattered by a demonic entity that calls itself Zozo.

programme.desc: China’s wild lands are so vast and so extreme with creatures seen nowhere else on earth.

programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Sumerian Gods
programme.desc: The ancient Sumerian city of Nippur is one of the richest archaeological sites on Earth, but decades of conflict have prevented its exploration. Now, experts gain rare access to finally uncover the mysteries behind the most sacred city of Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Jeremiah Code
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Sumerian Gods
programme.desc: The ancient Sumerian city of Nippur is one of the richest archaeological sites on Earth, but decades of conflict have prevented its exploration. Now, experts gain rare access to finally uncover the mysteries behind the most sacred city of Mesopotamia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Fountain of Youth Found?
programme.desc: A strange structure shaped like a giant shark might point the way to a lost civilization's fountain of youth. A massive hurricane heads toward Florida, but something unexpected is in its eye.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bloody Secret of the Lost City
programme.desc: A vast structure buried in the sands near the legendary city of Petra points to a bloody past. When terrorists kidnap more than 200 schoolgirls in northern Nigeria, rescuers use satellites to track them down.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: New discoveries from space give experts new clues in the hunt for Jack the Ripper. When a strange object crash-lands in Antarctica, experts speculate it could be an alien visitor.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Treasure of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Strange spots near the Grand Canyon may hold clues to the legendary treasure of a notorious bandit. Satellite images could explain desert ruins rumored to be an entrance to an underworld. A city-size chunk of ice suddenly disappears in Antarctica.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Speed Freaks
programme.desc: How do the fastest athletes alive stack up against high-tech cars and jets? The team breaks down the science of speed to determine who reigns supreme.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya
programme.desc: A young boy makes international headlines when he uses satellite images to discover lost cities of the Maya. Satellite images might point to a modern-day genocide. Trees in China seem to be spelling out a sinister message.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dracula's Tomb
programme.desc: Strange mounds in Transylvania might pinpoint the location of the tomb of the bloodthirsty tyrant believed to have inspired Dracula. A mysterious ancient city is discovered on a coral reef. Images of a plane crash sets off a hunt for a drug lord.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son is Damaged Goods
programme.desc: Jeanne Avsenew and her young son Peter were close, but as Peter matured, his obsession with death grew. The day Jeanne finds a bullet with her name scrawled on it, she realizes her son wants her dead, and Jeanne must take drastic measures to keep safe.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Guess I've Got No Conscience
programme.desc: A woman's body is found strangled and partially nude off the side of a Connecticut country road. Investigators apprehend a suspect in her murder, only to discover he's a prolific serial killer - responsible for the rape and the murder of eight women.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Disappearance of Kristin Smart
programme.desc: Kristin Smart was a college freshman who vanished in 1996 after attending a party just off the campus of California Polytechnic State University. Police have had a suspect since early on in the investigation, but no one has been charged.

programme.title: American Monster: Out of His Shell
programme.desc: Doting parents Brett and Mona Wehde live a quiet life in sleepy rural Iowa raising their three children. When a new family arrives, relationships flourish, but behind closed doors a wicked plot is hatched that soon destroys life as they know it forever.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Guess I've Got No Conscience
programme.desc: A woman's body is found strangled and partially nude off the side of a Connecticut country road. Investigators apprehend a suspect in her murder, only to discover he's a prolific serial killer - responsible for the rape and the murder of eight women.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Am The Devil
programme.desc: A missing Colorado woman's roommate claims she'll do anything to help find her, but investigators fear they may have a rare female psychopath on their hands. Later, a killer's angry outbursts could be real, or just an act put on by a skilled manipulator.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Disappearance of Kristin Smart
programme.desc: Kristin Smart was a college freshman who vanished in 1996 after attending a party just off the campus of California Polytechnic State University. Police have had a suspect since early on in the investigation, but no one has been charged.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing. Then When Kenda investigates the mysterious death of a successful dentist, the case gets personal.

programme.title: Real Detective: Lambs to the Slaughter
programme.desc: Lake County, FL Chief Investigator Rocky Harris is called in to the most haunting case of his career - the rape and murder of a young girl. Wading through bad police work and dead ends, Rocky is sickened when he uncovers the identity of the killer.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A wealthy power-couple's marriage is in shambles. When the husband reports killing his wife in self-defense, it's up to Detective McFadden to prove, against long odds and high-priced attorneys, that this influential citizen is a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Bad Man
programme.desc: A young couple is bludgeoned in their own home and the only witness, the woman's three-year-old son. With nothing else to go on, detective Don Forgan begins a series of interviews with the witness with hopes it leads to a break in the case.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Count the Bodies
programme.desc: A pair of murders linked by a mysterious note puzzles police as they scramble to stop a budding serial killer. What they don't realize is the murderer has a target in mind and nothing, not even a growing body count, will stand in his way.

programme.title: Dateline: Vengeance
programme.desc: A woman accuses her boyfriend of raping her and then finds herself on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dateline: The Stranger
programme.desc: She vanished into thin air. Who might have played a role in the mysterious disappearance of Brittany Tavar? There was a handsome boarder and the friend turned enemy or did the free spirit just up and leave on her own?

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Cruel and Unusual
programme.desc: When a father finds his teen daughter brutally murdered, a family fights for justice. With no clear motive and no witnesses, the killer remains at large. Until police uncover a cold-blooded betrayal, exposing a dark underworld inside this quiet town.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: 19-year-old Micah Rineis striking out on her own when she falls for fellow college student Thomas Pate. But when their love takes her far away from family and friends, Micah begins to wonder who she can really trust.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Malcolm and Lindy Robertson leave their family behind to sail the open seas of retirement together. Lindy eventually learns to love Malcolm's dream of sailing to Thailand but paradise soon turns into an unfathomable nightmare.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Money Can't Buy You Love
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tennessee is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder victim's body floating in the river. Authorities must discover first who the deceased is and then who could have committed the horrendous crime.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.desc: Mark Bowe returns to the finished homes of some of his favourite 'Barnwood Builders' jobs. After months of work, the 100% cabin, Rose's cabin, the Boy Scout cabin and many more are living new lives as modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Bonanza
programme.desc: The builders score a major salvage from a barn near one of America's oldest pine forests in Brookville, Pennsylvania. Later, Mark and Sherman visit a local mill that turns reclaimed wood into spectacular products.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Teach and Train

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Double Pen Log Vacation Rental

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Design Drama

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Split Crew

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Deep Creek Dreaming
programme.desc: Two couples team up to buy their dream vacation house on Deep Creek Lake, Maryland. Their agreed upon must-haves include water views and space for nine people. However, finding a property that both couples agree on may be a challenge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ask the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters answer all questions Cabin Master-related, as asked by their viewers on social media.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Work Smarter, Not Harder
programme.desc: Chase, Ryan and Ashley reveal some of their favorite tips and tricks of the trade.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Snackmasters: Burger King
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix asks two top-drawer chefs, Claude Bosi and Lisa Goodwin-Allen, to re-create a Whopper and fries in a Burger King restaurant in the fastest possible time. A panel of the fast-food chain's employees decides the winner.

programme.desc: Chef Bobby prepares a perfect springtime brunch for any family gathering. Inspired by hot cross buns, he makes spiced raisin pancakes and rum raisin cream cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cuisine du Jour
programme.desc: Bobby whisks us away to the South of France as he cooks up a delicious brunch menu inspired by one of his favorite places. All good French food is accompanied by a Baguette and Bobby toasts his with Goat Cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Flavors of New England
programme.desc: Bobby takes a culinary trip to New England for his latest brunch.
