programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Crawfish to California
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie and Sunday Dinner Sundaes

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Super Girls/ Held Back
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isn't only a guy thing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheer Up, Candace/ Fireside Girl Jamboree
programme.desc: Candace is down after Jeremy cancels their date/ Candace hopes to join the Fireside Girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part I: The Night of De Spell
programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part II: The Day of the Ducks!
programme.desc: As Magica's shadow army descends Duckburg into chaos, the family bands together to save Scrooge.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Horizon High- Part One
programme.desc: Peter is accepted into Horizon High: a school for geniuses, where his best friend Harry Osborn was just suspended. Peter makes his debut as Spider-man and must battle the Vulture.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Horizon High- Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man must work to stop the Scorpion from wreaking havoc at the museum.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Osborn Academy
programme.desc: Norman Osborn creates the Osborn Academy for Geniuses as a way of saving his son, Harry, the embarrassment of being suspended from Horizon High.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: A Day In The Life
Marvel's Spider-Man: Party Animals
programme.desc: Horizon High throws a dance in honor of Harry being exonerated, but Norman asks Harry to stay at the Oz Academy.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Sandman
programme.desc: Spider-Man meets the powerful, yet uncontrollable Sandman and helps him reunite with his estranged daughter with the help of the Venom symbiote.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: All-In! Judgement Joker!
programme.desc: As the Bey Carnival heats up, Arman and Ashindra take the stage against Joe Lazure and Joker; will they meet the same fate as the other Victories members before them?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: A Wall of Flames Part 1
programme.desc: A string of horrifying fires plagues California in the Eighties and Nineties, one of them fatally trapping four people inside. Are these raging infernos accidental or is someone setting them deliberately?

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: Chasing a Pyromaniac Part 2
programme.desc: In a race against time, investigators hunt for an arsonist setting devastating fires across California. To their complete shock, the man responsible turns out to be none other than renowned fire investigator Captain John Orr.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Goren and Eames uncover the sexual paranoia behind the murder of a hunky poster boy when he turns up dead after a night of sex and drugs with an unknown woman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Major Case
programme.desc: After watching a neighbouring young girl, a lonely man offers her refuge when she is on the run from an irate drug dealer. She thanks him by kissing him, but things take a turn for the worse and the man kills her in a fit of rage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Delicate
programme.desc: When a promising ballerina dies at the New York conservatory, Nichols and Stevens uncover murder and betrayal in a place known for its art and beauty.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Party Crashers
programme.desc: Some college buddies crash a party in an idyllic Southern California town. But when alcohol flows and jealousy rages, the night turns deadly. The case goes cold for more than a decade before the truth is finally uncovered and justice is served.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea
programme.desc: When a celebration starts to sour, tempers flare and someone vanishes. Days later, a body is discovered in an unsavory part of a Northern California town. When the case goes cold, it will take a most unexpected plea to finally catch a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Movie: World War Z
programme.desc: A UN employee traverses the world in race against time to stop the Zombie pandemic that is toppling governments and armies and threatening to destroy humanity itself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father Knows Worst
programme.desc: When Homer observes Bart and Lisa struggling in certain aspects of their academic and social lives at school, he becomes a proponent of 'helicopter parenting,' the process of closely monitoring a child and forcing them to succeed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa visit the nail salon where they engage in a spirited debate as to whether a woman can be smart, powerful and beautiful all at the same time. To prove their point, they spin four tales of famous women starring familiar Springfield faces.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Coming to Homerica
programme.desc: When Springfield receives an influx of unemployed workers from neighbouring Ogdenville, Mayor Quimby decides to close its borders and Homer sets up a border patrol group.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Whopper
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy casts Homer as the lead in 'Everyman,' a feature film based on a superhero who possesses the ability to take on the powers of every superhero in every comic he touches. Unfortunately, the studio hires a trainer to whip Homer into shape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets a 'Z'
programme.desc: When Mrs. Krabappel confiscates the students' cellphones, Bart leads an organized effort to stop her by spiking her coffee and watching her make a drunken fool of herself. Principal Skinner fires her and replaces her with a cool new teacher.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Wife Hope
programme.desc: The men and boys of Springfield become obsessed with Mixed Martial Arts, a sport where fighters inflict severe pain on one another. When Marge and her friends stage a protest, the show's promoter embraces the controversy and challenges Marge to a match.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranks and Greens

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rednecks and Broomsticks
programme.desc: After getting lost in a game of hide-and-seek, Lisa wanders into the field and discovers three teenage girls who are practicing Wiccans. Just before Lisa joins them, Chief Wiggum arrests the three girls for witchcraft and Lisa becomes the trial witness.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Armageddon USA
programme.desc: When the people of a thriving Midwestern town suddenly disappear, they leave behind an eerie ghost town with a dark secret. Experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if the mysterious exodus could be evidence of a freak natural disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Camouflaged nuclear vaults and a strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center are now deserted facilities; experts investigate the secrets behind these mysterious military structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of Nuclear Secrets
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history. Experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Animal Mummies: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt's animal mummies are one of antiquity's darkest mysteries, and today, innovative new imaging technology reveals what's inside these strange relics. The shocking truth challenges everything we know about worship in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on
programme.desc: After getting engaged, Nikki Ansley takes a job at a local convenience store in order to pay for her upcoming nuptials. But her best-laid plans are horrifically derailed when two unwelcome customers show up right before closing time.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Red Christmas
programme.desc: In December 2003, police respond to a mysterious 911 call at a home in the tony Walnut Estates in Mansfield, Texas. When authorities enter they discover two bloodied bodies. The key to finding the killer is within one of the victim's grasp.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Delphi Killer
programme.desc: A quiet rural town is rocked when two middle-school girls go on a hike and are later found murdered. But when police discover one of the girls may have recorded her killer with her cellphone, the race is on to find the mysterious man.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Divorced and in Danger
programme.desc: A divorcee turns to the internet for romance and soon meets a sexy entrepreneur. But when she's found brutally murdered in her own home, detectives discover that Sheila was lured into the dark world of S&M.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Design
programme.desc: 27-year-old single mom Laura Ackerson is looking to make a fresh start in Raleigh, North Carolina. She starts a new company and new relationships while battling for custody of her two young children. She also meets her untimely demise.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Dear Friend, Dead Friend
programme.desc: In Manor, Pennsylvania, a fun-loving 25-year-old is gunned down on the railroad tracks. What first looks like a botched robbery is quickly reclassified as a brutal assassination, casting the victim's best friends as prime suspects.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: 20-year-old Steve Bryant thinks he's found his calling among the peaceful, robe-wearing Hare Krishna community. But when he defies a despotic renegade guru, Bryant learns that ultimate devotion has a dark and deadly side.

programme.title: Love Kills: Damning Our Future
programme.desc: When Chance and Danielle first lock eyes, sparks fly. Both have a history of breaking the law. They fall madly in love and move in together with Danielle's young daughter. But when they can't pay their bills, they're lured back to a life of crime.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Go to Daddy
programme.desc: The black sheep of the family has spent a lifetime in the shadow of her prodigal younger sister. As the relationship with her mother takes a turn for the worse, things build to a boil that will leave one family member dead.

programme.title: Motives & Murders: Sheltered from the Truth
programme.desc: It's a September morning in 1973, and Debra Dill's bludgeoned body is discovered next to her car in rural Maine. Her grieving community wakes up to a nightmare, but it will take nearly two decades before the killer is behind bars.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Professor Bill Douglas falls for high-end call girl Robin after his marriage to Nancy grows stale. But when Bill struggles to pay Robin and Nancy learns about the affair, the Professor is caught in a situation he can't lecture his way out of.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dis-Kabob-Ulated
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the kabob with spicy beef kabobs and vanilla lime pineapple skewers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Switched on Baklava
programme.desc: Phyllo dough can be finicky but host Alton Brown tames this difficult pastry to create that wonderfully layered dessert known as baklava.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful V
programme.desc: The secret to perfect thin and crispy wood-fired pizzas at home is revealed.

programme.title: Good Eats: Porterhouse Rules
programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about porterhouses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Reno
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Reno, NV, for a food scene that loves to entertain. He embraces Reno's small town pride as he savors homemade meatballs and ravioli, gets a taste of Basque culture and meets some forward-thinking chefs.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Cleveland
programme.desc: Andrew visits Cleveland for a taste of the city's culinary comeback. He gets nostalgic at the West Side Market, discovers new classics in a 100-year-old food hall and swings by a neighborhood butcher shop that's earning rave reviews.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Southern Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the comfort food of the South. He visits a historic cafe in Atlanta for fried chicken and a Memphis joint for ribs. Then he checks out biscuits in Nashville, frogmore stew near Charleston, SC, and shrimp and grits in Savannah.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Seasons Eatings
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean finds the reasoning for the seasoning in some sweet holiday treats.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Book of Food
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean does a deep dive into the most holy recipe book of all time, The Bible.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Sounds Delicious
programme.desc: Michael McKean sounds off on how a little sizzle can sell a lot of Fajitas.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Shape of Things
programme.desc: Michael McKean cracks open the old geometry book and studies the shapes of some of our favourite foods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Diner Delights
programme.desc: Grab your greasy spoon and see how the milkshake gets mixed up and how the Cobb Salad became a Hollywood icon.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rainbow Connections
programme.desc: Somewhere over the rainbow, Host Michael McKean's dreams come true as he discovers some of our tastiest technicolor treats.

programme.title: Good Eats: Curious Yet Tasty Avocado Experiments
programme.desc: Although the avocado is best known for its staring roll in guacamole, this multifaceted culinary actor can also take on rolls usually played by eggs, butter, and even shortening.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puff the Magic Mallow
programme.desc: Alton Brown shares the sweet, sticky science behind homemade marshmallows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Apple of My Pie
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown makes everybody's favourite: apple pie.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the code to true 'cue: brined pork, a flower pot, a trashcan, hardwood smoke and a lot of patience, resulting in a delicious Pulled Pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tamale Never Dies
programme.desc: Alton embarks on a historical and tasty exploration of tamales, which are quite possibly the original convenience food.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 5: Asian Noodles
programme.desc: Alton Brown investigates the culinary possibilities of Asian noodles.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Steak
programme.desc: In the culinary world of signature meals, nothing else compares to the sensory experience of steak.

programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Ten Gallon Trophy/ Plane Crazy
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Battling Headquarters/ Gekko and the Mayhem at the Museum
programme.desc: Night Ninja creates a fortress of his own to take down the PJ Masks. When Romeo unleashes his Big Box of Bad, Gekko fails to stop him.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Star Buddies / To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: PJR wants to be Newton's Space Buddy, but first he needs to power up! Cat Boy wants to be able to teleport to the moon like Motsuki.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: A Fairy Big Knot/ Rosie the Rescuer
programme.desc: Frida Fairy Flier's strings get into an enormous tangle. Then, Rosie the ambulance loves acting out pretend, heroic rescue scenes. But when Doc calls Rosie for a real accident, she totally freezes.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Demitri the Dazzling!/ Smitten With a Kitten
programme.desc: When Demitri's bunny, Carrots, messes up his magic supplies, Demitri decides to get a new sidekick. Doc brings home a kitten and Lambie falls instantly in love.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: National Bob Day/ 7th Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Bob and the pugs head to the Baseball Hall of Fame. Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: We're The Chipmunks/ Save the Dance
programme.desc: When a new boy band, 'The Hipmunks,' tries to steal the spotlight, the Chipmunks are forced to compete in a battle of the bands.The Principal gives Alvin and Derek an ultimatum. If they fight, the school dance will be canceled.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Temp/ Parent Trap
programme.desc: When Bocarter's father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Dave's help, locking the two families in a heated competition.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Knights/ Snake Charmer
programme.desc: Theodore hopes to be a knight and comically struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Girly Squirrely/ Birthday Battle
programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Saving Face/ Matters of the Kart
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid are determined to find out if the new building tenant is their favorite wrestler – La Tormenta.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: Home of the Fave/ Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites. When Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a-million soccer goal, Lynn has to try and be supportive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The New Leaf/ Once Bitten
programme.desc: In the battle for fast food supremacy, Plankton has decided to throw in the towel and start a new business selling trinkets and souvenirs; Gary starts biting everyone in town, and Squidward is convinced that he has a rare snail disease.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dad's Speech/ School Dance
programme.desc: Annie tries to help Dad work through his stage fright by encouraging him to be more like Pony. Everyone is dreading the Valentine's school dance, so Annie and Pony try to get it cancelled.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfishing
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick decide to take Squidward jellyfishing.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Rocket Trouble/ The Brave and the Mold
programme.desc: The rocket van gets some sweet mods; mold strikes the bread mines.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Sponge Who Could Fly
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick come up with numerous ways to fly.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
