programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theodore's Calling/ Clumsy Jeanette
programme.desc: Miss Croner attempts to help Theodore discover his true calling in life. Jeanette is suddenly very clumsy because of her new glasses.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Sleeps/ Fireworks School
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon/ Canary
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pirates Life/ World Record
programme.desc: When pirates show up at the house, the boys do all they can to protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record in hopes of winning a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Tour Bus/ Game Show
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin Management/ Time Capsule
programme.desc: When Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much, a therapist moves in to help Dave control his anger. When the school digs up an old high school time capsule, Miss Smith and Dave work together to keep an old secret.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: Amphibia: Ivy on the Run/ After the Rain
programme.desc: Fed up with her mother's strict rules, Ivy devises a plan to run away. Then, Anne asks Hop Pop to retrieve the music box, bringing some long-buried secrets to light.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Jack Takes a Tumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: I Wanna Dance With Somebody
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.desc: In the Bey Carnival semifinals, Dante clashes with Joe while Fumiya goes up against Lodin; the battles have never been wilder and the stakes have never been higher!

programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Oates & Oates
programme.desc: While throwing a telethon at their college to raise money for Earth Day, Barry attempts to woo Ren when he overpromises he can get Hall & Oates to perform.

programme.title: Mom: A Safe Word and a Rib Eye
programme.desc: Christy feels left out when Bonnie and the ladies keep Jill's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: A Moving Finale
programme.desc: When Mandy and Kyle are hesitant to move out of the Baxter household and into their own place, Mike gives them some tough love. Meanwhile Ed and Chuck try to avoid contributing to Boyd's theater fundraiser.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Eve's Band
programme.desc: Eve and her friend Cammy form a new band, they sound so horrible that Mike comes up with an idea to break them up, but his plan has unexpected results. Meanwhile, Kyle and Mandy babysit Boyd.

programme.title: Mom: Dirty Money and a Woman Named Mike
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are shocked when they discover how prison has changed their friend Regina.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Dirty Cookie, Muddy Election/ My Stuffed Cat
programme.desc: Suing for damaged property; argument over a stuffed cat.

programme.desc: Mother sues for property damage; woman sues for breach of contract.

programme.title: Protection Court: I've Been Going to Church/ Daughter Broke Down Door
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Costly Outburst?/ Compost Fertilizer Competition
programme.desc: Neighbor sues mother over son's disruptive outburst; landscaper claims he wasn't paid.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Luper vs. Downs
programme.desc: A Kentucky dated a woman he met in church and gave her twins his last name, but he's now in court to find out if he is their biological father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Smith vs. Smith
programme.desc: An Atlanta man claims his estranged wife waited three years to tell him that another man is her daughter's father and both of her lover's come to court to find out the truth.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Jeffrey is suing Alicia and Matthew for property damage to his car, but Alicia and Matthew say they aren't responsible for vandalizing the vehicle.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff petitioned the court for a paternity test because she wants to prove that the defendant is the father of her five-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Getting the Picture ' and 'What a Double Crosser .'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Gross Misrepresentation ' and 'Drowning a Guy Out.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Grooming Sisters/ Drowning in the Basement

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Patricia is suing Andrew for breach of contract on an incorrect and incomplete fence repair job as well as the materials purchased for said job. Andrew says he fulfilled his end of the contract and that Patricia just wants everything for free.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did Not Fracture My Newborn's Skull
programme.desc: Jessica is suspected of giving her newborn child a brain injury, but her sister says she would do no such thing. Then, Hanna is accused of abusing her child by her own mother.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove My 16 Year Old Son Is Not the Father!
programme.desc: Carolyn believes that her son Demetris is not the father of his girlfriend Tianna’s son. Demetris disagrees with his mom and wants to be involved in his son’s life. More importantly he wants his mother to accept his son and Tianna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fights Get Ugly
programme.desc: Shania has some relationship drama with her boyfriend Chris. She learned he is obsessed with social media and has been messaging random women online. Chris claims he has commitment issues.

programme.title: Maury: I Survived ... Now I Need a Makeover!
programme.desc: Sabrina survived domestic abuse; now her friend Precious wants to give her a makeover. Cassidy and Lacey say their mom's styles stuck in the 1980s and want to give her a makeover. Victoria wants her sister Shaina to have a makeover to lift her up.
